title: Bench tests with vitest's bench API
scenario_context: Performance regression undetected. Manual benchmarking inconsistent.
what_should_be_tested: Critical hot paths benchmarked; regression alerts when median drops.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. vitest bench() runs N iterations, reports ops/s with histogram.
2. Compare against baseline file; fail if regression > 10%.
3. Run separately from tests to avoid CI noise.
mock_strategy: Use real code for the unit under test and fake only external boundaries with deterministic, assertion-visible test doubles.

title: Testing infinite scroll
scenario_context: List loads more on scroll. Tests scroll programmatically; jsdom doesn't fire scroll events the same as browser.
what_should_be_tested: Reaching bottom triggers load.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Mock IntersectionObserver (test-074 pattern) with trigger.
2. Trigger sentinel intersection; assert new items load.
mock_strategy: IO mock with trigger.

title: Testing multipart form upload
scenario_context: Server accepts multipart/form-data. supertest sends one way; library bug only with binary.
what_should_be_tested: Binary uploads parse correctly; metadata fields retain values.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. supertest .attach() for files, .field() for metadata.
2. Real binary buffer attached.
3. Assert response includes file info AND metadata.
mock_strategy: Real multer.

title: Testing window.print() trigger
scenario_context: Print button calls window.print(). Tests assert nothing about whether it fired.
what_should_be_tested: Print dialog invoked.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Override window.print pre-navigation; assert called.
mock_strategy: addInitScript before navigation.

title: Property: schema validator round-trips parse-serialize
scenario_context: Zod schema + custom transform. Bug: transform asymmetric, validation accepted output that wouldn't re-validate.
what_should_be_tested: For any valid input, parse(serialize(parse(x))) === parse(x).
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Generate inputs that pass schema.
2. Round-trip; assert stability after second parse.
3. Catches transform asymmetry.
mock_strategy: Use real code for the unit under test and fake only external boundaries with deterministic, assertion-visible test doubles.

title: Killing string-method mutants
scenario_context: `title.trim().toLowerCase()`. Mutants remove .trim or .toLowerCase; tests don't catch when inputs already trimmed/lower.
what_should_be_tested: Mixed-case + padded inputs prove each transform ran.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Inputs designed to differ pre/post transform.
2. ' Hello ' → 'hello' verifies both trim and lowercase.
mock_strategy: Use real code for the unit under test and fake only external boundaries with deterministic, assertion-visible test doubles.

title: Test profile: pre-deploy smoke vs full suite
scenario_context: Single test command runs everything; deploys gated by 22-min suite when 2-min smoke would suffice.
what_should_be_tested: Distinct profiles for CI scenarios.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Tag tests with @smoke @critical @nightly.
2. CI workflows pick by tag.
3. Deploy gate: smoke + critical (5 min).
mock_strategy: Use real code for the unit under test and fake only external boundaries with deterministic, assertion-visible test doubles.
ci_considerations: Run deterministically in CI with isolated fixtures, recorded seed/log artifacts, and no hidden network or wall-clock dependency.

title: Testing focus restoration after modal close
scenario_context: Modal closes, focus lost to body. Keyboard users lose place.
what_should_be_tested: Focus returns to trigger after close.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Modal stores opener element, restores on close.
2. Test: focus trigger, open, close, assert document.activeElement.
mock_strategy: Use real code for the unit under test and fake only external boundaries with deterministic, assertion-visible test doubles.

title: Testing pagination cursor security
scenario_context: Cursor includes user_id. Bug: client-side cursor manipulation lets user see other users' data.
what_should_be_tested: Cursor includes signed component; tampering rejected.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Sign cursor server-side; verify on read.
2. Test forged cursor rejected.
mock_strategy: Use real code for the unit under test and fake only external boundaries with deterministic, assertion-visible test doubles.

title: Testing tab navigation order
scenario_context: Form tab order broken after refactor; users tab through fields out of visual order.
what_should_be_tested: Tab moves through form in correct sequence.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Focus first element, press Tab N times, assert activeElement at each step.
2. Sequence is the spec.
mock_strategy: Use real code for the unit under test and fake only external boundaries with deterministic, assertion-visible test doubles.

title: Testing services with abort signals
scenario_context: Long-running fetch should be cancellable. Bug: cancelling didn't actually abort, network kept going.
what_should_be_tested: Abort signal cancels in-flight work.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Service accepts AbortSignal.
2. Abort mid-flight → rejects with AbortError.
3. No further side effects after abort.
mock_strategy: fetch mocked.

title: Testing form auto-save with dirty tracking
scenario_context: Save indicator shows 'Saving…' when dirty. Bug: indicator stuck after save complete.
what_should_be_tested: Dirty flag clears after successful save.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Test transitions: clean → dirty (on input) → saving → clean.
2. Real-timer or fake-timer based on debounce.
3. Final state asserted.
mock_strategy: Fake timers.

title: Testing webhook signature with multiple secrets (rotation)
scenario_context: Secret rotation: accept old AND new for grace period. Test only checks new.
what_should_be_tested: Both secrets valid during rotation; old rejected after rotation period.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Verification tries primary then secondary.
2. Test both signatures pass.
3. After rotation completes, secondary is the new primary.
mock_strategy: Use real code for the unit under test and fake only external boundaries with deterministic, assertion-visible test doubles.

title: Property: queue FIFO order
scenario_context: Custom queue. Bug: race in dequeue returned items out of order.
what_should_be_tested: Dequeued items in same order as enqueued.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Enqueue N items; dequeue all; compare to input.
2. Empty queue returns undefined.
mock_strategy: Use real code for the unit under test and fake only external boundaries with deterministic, assertion-visible test doubles.

title: Headless vs headed E2E behavior
scenario_context: Tests pass headed (debug mode), fail headless in CI. Different rendering quirks.
what_should_be_tested: Suite passes headless = CI environment.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Always run CI headless; mirror locally for debugging difficult tests.
2. Pin browser version; same args headed/headless.
mock_strategy: Use real code for the unit under test and fake only external boundaries with deterministic, assertion-visible test doubles.
ci_considerations: Run deterministically in CI with isolated fixtures, recorded seed/log artifacts, and no hidden network or wall-clock dependency.

title: Testing color contrast in components
scenario_context: Brand color updated; some text became unreadable. Lighthouse only checks production.
what_should_be_tested: Components meet WCAG AA contrast.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. axe-core has color-contrast rule.
2. Run on each component story.
3. Critical text must meet 4.5:1.
mock_strategy: Use real code for the unit under test and fake only external boundaries with deterministic, assertion-visible test doubles.

title: Testing scroll-based navigation (anchor links)
scenario_context: In-page anchors with smooth scroll. Tests pass without verifying actual position.
what_should_be_tested: Click on anchor scrolls target into view.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. After click, wait for scroll animation.
2. Assert target in viewport via getBoundingClientRect.
mock_strategy: Use real code for the unit under test and fake only external boundaries with deterministic, assertion-visible test doubles.

title: Testing request logging includes correlation ID
scenario_context: Production debugging requires tracing one request across services. Logs missing correlation ID.
what_should_be_tested: Every log entry for a request includes the same correlation ID.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. AsyncLocalStorage holds ID per request.
2. Logger reads from store.
3. Test: middleware sets ID; nested code logs; assert ID in log.
mock_strategy: console.log spied.

title: Snapshot serializers for ANSI color codes
scenario_context: CLI tool output includes ANSI codes; snapshots break depending on TTY detection.
what_should_be_tested: Snapshots stable regardless of color support.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Snapshot serializer strips ANSI escape sequences.
2. Production CLI still uses color; only test view normalizes.
mock_strategy: Use real code for the unit under test and fake only external boundaries with deterministic, assertion-visible test doubles.

title: Testing portals to non-body targets
scenario_context: Tooltip renders into a specific container, not body. Tests query whole doc, find duplicates.
what_should_be_tested: Portal renders to the correct target.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Querying screen when container scope needed
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Test renders host with target node.
2. Assert portal child inside target.
3. Use within() to scope queries.
mock_strategy: Use real code for the unit under test and fake only external boundaries with deterministic, assertion-visible test doubles.

title: Testing for safe shutdown (drain in-flight requests)
scenario_context: Server SIGTERM: in-flight requests drop. Cause 500s during deploy.
what_should_be_tested: Server stops accepting new requests but completes in-flight before exit.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. http.Server.close() stops new connections, waits for current.
2. Long-running request started; SIGTERM; assert it completes.
mock_strategy: Real http server.

title: Property: regex-based validation accepts spec, rejects rest
scenario_context: Phone validator regex. Bug: accepted '12345' as valid US phone.
what_should_be_tested: Valid phones accepted; invalid rejected.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. fc.string with valid-phone generator → expect true.
2. fc.string filtered to NON-phone → expect false.
3. Edge: too short, too long, non-digits.
mock_strategy: Use real code for the unit under test and fake only external boundaries with deterministic, assertion-visible test doubles.

title: Block coverage vs branch coverage
scenario_context: Block coverage 100%; branch coverage 65%. Mutations in untested branches survive.
what_should_be_tested: Branch coverage gate, not line.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Configure coverage thresholds with branch high.
2. Branch reveals untested else paths.
3. Combine with mutation for highest signal.
mock_strategy: Use real code for the unit under test and fake only external boundaries with deterministic, assertion-visible test doubles.

title: Test grouping for shard balancing
scenario_context: Tests sharded by file count; one shard has all the integration tests, finishes 4x later.
what_should_be_tested: Shards balanced by historical duration.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Reuse Playwright timing reports as test-020.
2. Vitest has --shard but file-level only; for finer control, group via directory or custom runner.
mock_strategy: Use real code for the unit under test and fake only external boundaries with deterministic, assertion-visible test doubles.
ci_considerations: Run deterministically in CI with isolated fixtures, recorded seed/log artifacts, and no hidden network or wall-clock dependency.

title: Testing scroll-restore on back navigation
scenario_context: User scrolls long list, clicks item, goes back. Scroll position lost.
what_should_be_tested: Back restores scroll position.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. RR v7 has scrollRestoration. Configure + test.
2. Test: scroll, navigate forward, back, assert scroll restored.
mock_strategy: Use real code for the unit under test and fake only external boundaries with deterministic, assertion-visible test doubles.

title: Testing OAuth callback handling
scenario_context: OAuth flow: redirect to provider, callback with code, exchange for token. Test only the page; callback parsing untested.
what_should_be_tested: Callback URL with code triggers token exchange; UI updates.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Navigate directly to /auth/callback?code=test → server exchanges.
2. Mock provider's token endpoint via Playwright route.
3. Test error param (denied) too.
mock_strategy: Token endpoint mocked.
ci_considerations: Run deterministically in CI with isolated fixtures, recorded seed/log artifacts, and no hidden network or wall-clock dependency.

title: Testing batch endpoint atomicity
scenario_context: POST /batch accepts N operations. Bug: partial failures left half-applied state.
what_should_be_tested: All-or-nothing semantics: any op fails → no ops applied.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Wrap batch in DB transaction.
2. Test: include one failing op; assert no others applied.
mock_strategy: Real DB transaction.

title: Testing CommonJS published modules
scenario_context: Library publishes both ESM and CJS. Tests only verify ESM. CJS consumers break.
what_should_be_tested: Both bundles importable.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Smoke test imports each bundle.
2. Run in matrix or separate spec.
mock_strategy: Use real code for the unit under test and fake only external boundaries with deterministic, assertion-visible test doubles.
ci_considerations: Run deterministically in CI with isolated fixtures, recorded seed/log artifacts, and no hidden network or wall-clock dependency.

title: Testing nested suspense boundaries
scenario_context: Outer Suspense + inner Suspense. Outer fallback shows because inner promise pending, even though inner should be the boundary.
what_should_be_tested: Inner Suspense isolates pending state from outer.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Inner Suspense catches its child's suspension; outer doesn't see it.
2. Test: render with outer-resolved and inner-pending → outer content visible + inner fallback visible.
mock_strategy: Use real code for the unit under test and fake only external boundaries with deterministic, assertion-visible test doubles.
what_would_break_without_this_test: Whole UI flashes on small async update.

title: Testing for fastify/express performance plugins
scenario_context: Compression middleware silently disabled by ordering bug. Responses 5x larger.
what_should_be_tested: Responses are compressed when client accepts.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Request with Accept-Encoding: gzip.
2. Assert response Content-Encoding includes gzip.
3. Assert content-length smaller than raw.
mock_strategy: Use real code for the unit under test and fake only external boundaries with deterministic, assertion-visible test doubles.
